hooks.command: cd /home/user/ToolTimePro-Ai && git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=d 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' && { echo 'Running build check...' >&2; npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5; EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"stopReason": "Build failed! Fix TypeScript/lint errors before pushing."}'; exit 1; fi; } || true
